def process_stats(data, state_dict):
    # Correct: use fast local variables for the tight loop, then update the dictionary once at the end
    total = state_dict.get("total_processed", 0)
    bytes_p = state_dict.get("bytes_processed", 0)
    
    for item in data:
        total += 1
        bytes_p += len(item)
        
    state_dict["total_processed"] = total
    state_dict["bytes_processed"] = bytes_p
